prompt: A hyper-realistic, high-angle photograph of a cobblestone path in an ancient garden. The stones are laid in an impossibly complex, jagged zig-zag pattern, perfectly swerving to avoid every tiny blade of grass and individual stray pebble on the ground. The path is so intricate and narrow that it is useless for walking. Soft morning mist, moss-covered textures, 8k resolution, authentic National Geographic photography style, no digital artifacts.
metaphor: A garden path paved to perfectly curve around every minor ground imperfection, becoming so jagged and specific that it is impossible for anyone to actually walk down it.
